package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for handler_opens_transaction: Handlers that call `Begin`, `Transaction`, or unit-of-work start helpers directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule072NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule072NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule072NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario072Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule072NegativeService, input Rule072NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
